name: Anheuser-Busch InBev S.A./N.V.
h1: AB InBev, Budweiser's GCC footprint in India
lede: AB InBev, Budweiser runs four capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Mysuru and Medak, covering gcc/gic, it and manufacturing, built over twelve years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AB InBev, Budweiser office in India. We map four, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AB InBev, Budweiser GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AB InBev, Budweiser runs 4 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mysuru, Medak), covering gcc/gic, it and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Director - Global Tech Compliance | Digital Risk

about.description: AB InBev, Budweiser's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Mysuru and Medak, spanning gcc/gic, it and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 26 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AB InBev, Budweiser operate in India?
faq.a: AB InBev, Budweiser operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AB InBev, Budweiser have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AB InBev, Budweiser's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Mysuru and Medak.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AB InBev, Budweiser run in India?
faq.a: AB InBev, Budweiser runs gcc/gic, it and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AB InBev, Budweiser's India GCCs?
faq.a: AB InBev, Budweiser's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AB InBev, Budweiser's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 26 leaders at AB InBev, Budweiser's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
